rawAssistant: The morning light will reveal much that was hidden in the mist. Tomorrow, indeed, check your lanterns once more. Make sure the cord is not frayed and the metalwork is secure. The winds of Hollowfen can be unforgiving, but a well-tended lantern should guide you safely through the darkness.
